arc_premises: Dangerous events are unfolding in {location}. Someone must act.
An old prophecy is about to come true in {location}.
A stranger has arrived from {location} seeking help.

kill_quests.title: Goblin Problem
kill_quests.description: Villagers are reporting goblin raids near the road.

kill_quests.title: Bone Pile
kill_quests.description: The dead are walking in the old cemetery.

kill_quests.title: Wolf Hunt
kill_quests.description: A pack of dire wolves prowls the northern forest.

fetch_quests.title: Lost Letter
fetch_quests.description: Bandits stole a merchant's important correspondence.

fetch_quests.title: Alchemist's Herbs
fetch_quests.description: The alchemist needs rare herbs from the forest.

fetch_quests.title: Sacred Relic
fetch_quests.description: A temple relic has gone missing - retrieve it.

explore_quest.title: Exploration Mission
explore_quest.description: Scout the {location} area and report back.

dialogue_quest.title: The Elder's Secret
dialogue_quest.description: The village elder knows something. Find out what.

world_events.title: Roadside Ambush
world_events.description: Three bandits leap from the shadows!

world_events.title: Hidden Passage
world_events.description: You find a concealed passage behind the wall.

outcomes.0: Inside: an old chest with 25 gold!

world_events.title: Sudden Storm
world_events.description: A storm rolls in without warning.

outcomes.0: You find a nearby cave and wait it out.
outcomes.1: You press on, soaked and weary. -5 HP.

world_events.title: Trapped!
world_events.description: A hidden pressure plate triggers beneath your foot!

outcomes.0: You leap aside just in time!
